programme.desc: Christie makes Julia the perfect Hearty Beef Lasagna. Then, Jack challenges Bridget to a tasting of block mozzarella. And finally, Lan Lam makes Bridget a new weeknight favorite—Chicken Scarpariello.

programme.title: Cook's Country

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: What could be more American than strawberry shortcake? But sometimes this classic summer fare can go terribly wrong. When it comes to cherry cobbler, sour cherries are a must. But where do you get sour cherries? Are jarred cherries a worthy alternative?

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Who can resist a chocolate cake? We wanted cakes that would be great tasting and easy to prepare, and we came up with two: old-fashioned, moist, and homey; the other elegant, dense, and ethereal.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: We set out to create flavorful, fresh-tasting versions of Greek and spinach salads.

programme.desc: Having captured Yuri, Stoffel tries to convince him to join his side, but Josak sneaks him out as two armies prepare for battle...

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: While on a trip to find an imposter Demon King, Yuri, Conrad, and Wolfram come across Gwendal, and an encounter with a Sand Bear separates the group into two pairs.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Arriving in Svelera, Yuri and Gwendal meet a runaway bride who reveals she has the Demon Flute, but when Yuri tries to use it, it doesn't work!

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Gwendal and Yuri are put on trial over their \\"relationship\\" and when Yuri is unable to harm Gwendal to save himself, he is sentenced to hard labor in a mine filled with esoteric stones that suppress demon magic.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: With Norika reunited with her son, Yuri discovered the other piece of the Demon Flute and decides to see what it can do.

programme.title: Kyo Kara Maoh!
programme.desc: Yuri heads into a city after hearing of a stolen demon stone, finding in in the hands of a poor family that have been using it to earn money for food, leading Yuri to decide to help them out.

programme.title: Death Note: Encounter
programme.desc: The murders continue, and L grows suspicious of Light's too perfect behavior and decides to investigate him on his own.

programme.title: Death Note: Doubt
programme.desc: L's suspicion of Light deepens, compelling him to invite Light into the investigation.

programme.title: Death Note: Assault
programme.desc: As predicted on the tapes sent to Sakura TV, news anchors and commentators who expressed doubt about Kira die one by one.

programme.title: Death Note: Love
programme.desc: With a second Kira now on the loose, L asks Light to join the task force and pose as the real Kira in order to catch the copycat.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Gon departs on a journey to take the Hunter Exam and meets Leorio and Kurapika who also want to be Hunters.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: If Gon, Leorio and Kurapika cannot answer an old woman's question correctly, they will be immediately disqualified.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Escorted by the Kiriko the trio finally arrive at the exam site.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The exam for the First Phase consists of following Satotz, the proctor to the site of the Second Phase.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Misty wetlands await the participants as they emerge from the long tunnel. Visibility is poor and various monsters lie in wait.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Proctors Menchi and Buhara's test consists of preparing a dish that will satisfy the palate of Gourmet Hunters.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: Netero challenges Gon and Killua to a simple game. If they win, they earn the right to become Hunters.

programme.title: HUNTERxHUNTER
programme.desc: The airship arrives at the site of the Third Phase. To pass this test, entrants must reach the base of the tower within 72 hours.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: In feudal Japan, the half-demon Inuyasha was sealed away by the priestess Kikyo. Many years later he is revived by Kagome.

programme.title: Inuyasha
programme.desc: Kagome finds out that she may be the reincarnation of Kaede's late older sister, the priestess Kikyo, who sealed Inuyasha with her arrow.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The knowledge of antiques experts Angus Ashworth and Phil Serrell is put to the test as their celebrity companions are University Challenge icons Eric Monkman and Bobby Seagull.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Soap actors Peter Gunn and Melanie Hill join experts James Braxton and David Harper on an antiques hunt in Staffordshire and Derbyshire. A little ballerina and a big rocking horse make their way to auction.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Top stand-ups and actors Jo Brand and Kerry Godliman are rummaging in Kent for antiques with experts Catherine Southon and Steven Moore. A papier-mâché proves surprisingly popular at auction.

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The Repair Shop's Julie Tatchell and Amanda Middleditch team up with experts Tim Medhurst and James Braxton. They discover rare tiny toys in Birmingham and a very long church pew in Wolverhampton.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's day one of the new series! Anita Manning and Mark Stacey start their journey in Aberfeldy and head for auction glory in Dundee.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's still anyone's game, as Anita Manning and Mark Stacey travel from Wiston in South Lanarkshire to Edinburgh.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Day three of Anita Manning and Mark Stacey's antique hunt takes them from the Scottish borders to Sunderland, with a remarkable find along the way.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Day four of Anita Manning and Mark Stacey's journey from St. Helen Auckland to Darlington is derailed when their car breaks down.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Anita Manning and Mark Stacey's final leg takes them from Richmond in North Yorkshire to the auction showdown in Huby near York.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: A new day and a new team: experts Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon start their trip in Aboyne and finish up at an auction in Dundee.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Day two sees some tactical shenanigans from rivals Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon, as they travel from Perth to Paisley.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon's affections start to wane as they hit the road for day three, crossing the border from Glenluce to Carlisle.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The competition between Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon intensifies as they journey from Sedburgh to Leeds.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Philip Serrell and Catherine Southon head from Skipton to Liverpool for their final auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a curiosity that celebrates the work of author Charles Dickens.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include a previously unseen account of the sinking of the Titanic.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include an 18th-century box engraved with a secret code and a cigarette case.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Antiques Roadshow devotes an entire episode to celebrating the art and culture of India.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce visits the Royal Hall in Harrogate, where treasures include a sporting icon.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: In Harrogate, Yorkshire, a little ink drawing could be by Pablo Picasso.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Kelvingrove Art Gallery and Museum, 'the ugly pot' carries a highly attractive value.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: At Mark Hill values a pop art jacket designed by Sir Peter Blake.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures include rare items from the region's historic potteries.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Objects of interest include a pair of pistols used to protect the Royal Mail.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Finds include a very early movie camera and a dagger with a gruesome past.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines orangutans and crows, two unusual animals that use tools.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines creatures that have fascinated people for centuries; he looks at the expandable bodies of anacondas and camels.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: A look at some species with unusual styles of consuming food, including the gigantic blue whales and the flamboyant flamingos.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines some species with remarkable healing properties.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: A look at the incredible animals who can regenerate entire parts of their bodies, like salamanders and deer.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough examines bizarre and deadly hybrid animals.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough examines animals with the ability to find their way.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough examines the sizes of animals' young.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough discovers if animals and plants can count.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough investigates two shells that win at evolution.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough explores animals with fighting behavior.

programme.title: The Dark: Nature's Nighttime World
programme.desc: A team of biologists and camera specialists learn how animals have adapted to the dark; in Costa Rica, nighttime camera specialist Justine Evans has an exceptionally close encounter with a large male jaguar.

programme.title: The Dark: Nature's Nighttime World
programme.desc: Bryson Volrin encounters a curious sloth; Gordon Buchanan enters a deserted house that has been taken over by vampire bats.

programme.title: The Dark: Nature's Nighttime World
programme.desc: Justine Evans attempts to film the hunting behavior of the puma; Dr. George McGavin attaches a miniature tracking device to a vampire bat to discover whose blood it is feeding on.

programme.title: Seasonal Wonderlands
programme.desc: New England is the stage for the most incredible color change on earth, when the vivid greens of summer give way to the golds and reds of autumn.

programme.title: Wild China
programme.desc: The landscapes of southern China, where rice is cultivated and a mysterious system of underground rivers is just beginning to be explored.

programme.title: Wild Africa
programme.desc: Isolated and unstable mountains test the survival skills of wildlife in Africa.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is back on The Big Island as Cris Cyborg puts her Bellator MMA Featherweight World Championship on the line against Arlene 'Angerfist' Blencowe.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in Paris, France as Heavyweight World Champion Ryan 'Darth' Bader defends his belt against Chieck Kongo. Also, Yoel 'Soldier of God' Romero, battles it out with fast-rising contender Alex 'Eazy' Polizzi in a light heavyweight showdown.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: The Bellator MMA Interim Welterweight World Championship is up for grabs as Michael 'Venom' Page takes on Logan 'Storm' Storley. Also, MMA legend Lyoto 'The Dragon' Machida goes up against Fabian 'The Assassin' Edwards.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Mohegan Sun as Gegard 'The Dreamcatcher' Mousas looks to pick up the 50th win of his legendary career when he puts his Bellator MMA Middleweight World Championship on the line against powerhouse Johnny 'The Human Cheat Code' Eblen.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA is in Sioux Falls, South Dakota as Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu black belts collide in a matchup between the best submission specialists on the Bellator roster as Neiman Gracie clashes with Goiti Yamauchi.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Hollywood, Florida with an explosive night of fights. Champion Eddie Alvarez defends his belt against Lightweight Tournament Winner Michael Chandler in one of Bellator MMA's most epic fights.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues dialogue with Amanda who says she was sexually abused by her father, Earl Nix. Hear what Earl said to Amanda during a police-recorded phone call, which the jury heard. Amanda agrees to take a polygraph. Will the results convince? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The dangers of teenage sex & underage drinking continues. Plus, in 2011, Rehtaeh, 15, was raped by four classmates , & after intense bullying, the teen took her own life. Then, Alexis, who says she too was raped at 15. A powerful cautionary tale. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget says she's not sure what to believe about the relationship between her 38-year-old brother-in-law, Kevin, and 16-year-old daughter, Grace. Dr. Phil sits down one-on-one with Kevin. How does Kevin explain his actions? Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with Courtney who says former friend Amie fabricated several pregnancies and baby deaths. Dr. Phil asks Amie why there are no death records of her deceased children. Why did Amie walk off stage and explosively meltdown backstage? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melissa, 26, left home without warning & flew 2,000 miles across the country, leaving behind a note that said, "One day, Dr. Phil will be able to help me." The family says she hadn't "been herself." Melissa says she's ready to tell why she vanished.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with D’Andre who claims his abusive relationship with his girlfriend, Autumn, is partly due to what he calls her “messed up” upbringing. Hear what D’Andre says about violating the restraining order that Autumn has against him. Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: After former friends Randi & Haley tell Brittany's history of harassing men & faking pregnancies, Dr. Phil talks to Brittany and asks her to prove she is pregnant. What sent Brittany storming off stage? See the backstage conversation with Dr. Phil.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Binge drinking has increasingly become a way of life and death on college campuses. Dr. Phil talks to two 20-somethings who admit to binge drinking regularly, but say they are not alcoholics. Will one family's painful loss convince these two to sober up?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Angie says stepfather Ralph routinely sexually abused her as a teen. Angie says that her stepfather didn't stop with her, he turned his attention, affection & sexual abuse toward her daughter Hannah. They say grandma Leta knew, yet looked the other way.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Natalie's husband, Brian, was in a tragic work accident, falling from a 68-foot crane. Paralyzed from the knees down, she says Brian treats her & son Jacob, 13, like slaves not family. Their marriage has changed; Brian says it's too painful to even move.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Most kids dream of growing up and moving away from home, but what happens when your adult children still haven't flown the coop? Dr. Phil gives family freeloaders a wake-up call.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Melisa says her estranged husband, Chris, is a pathological liar. Chris admits he has a problem with telling the truth and insists he wants to change -- but does he really? What's at the root of Chris' behavior? Should Melisa stay or call it quits?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with the family of Amy, "Mother God", who says she can heal the world with her group, Love Has Won. The family alleges that Amy is a brainwashed "cult leader" and she is putting other people's lives at risk. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Samantha & sister Sarah say mom, Stacy, is a successful teacher & behaviorist, but when it comes to 33-year-old brother, Ben, it's another story. Stacy says teaching Ben how to pay bills and to eat his veggies helps Ben. Ben says he's just stuck in a rut.

channel.display-name: Best of The Drew Barrymore Show

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actor Justice Smith joins Drew and he's dishing about his latest film, "Dungeons and Dragons." Drew and Ross Mathews are joined by Ali Landry at the Drew's News desk as they serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Emily in Paris" including Lily Collins, Ashley Park, Philippine Leroy-Beaulieu and Lucas Bravo stop by to chat about the new season. The cast is also participating in an "Emily in Paris" style makeover for a deserving audience member.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Icon Martha Stewart and Drew tackle relationship red flags at the news desk and Martha reveals which young star she simply adores.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Lena Dunham on her new medieval comedy film "Catherine Called Birdy." Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Garcelle Beauva is for a special female empowerment edition of Drew's News. "Claiming Space" author and mentor Eliza Van Cort is sharing tips for female empowerment and how to claim your space.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bronwyn Tarboton is sharing some genius upcycling tips including how to create home décor out of items in your trash.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Making The Cut" Judge Nicole Richie updates Drew on her bearded dragon Speedy, the birthday trauma they've both experienced and what it's really like working with Heidi Klum.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Tiki Barber joins Drew & Ross Mathews on Drew's News covering headlines about lies in relationships & finding a sheep in an Airbnb. Chef Anne Burrell teaches cooking honey garlic salmon & charred string beans in Drew's Cooking School.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The celebration continues, and Drew's birthday twin Rachel Dratch has a delicious surprise for her when she joinsDrew and Ross Mathews at the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: All American" star Taye Diggs is joining Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk to hit the hottest headlines of the day! Jamila Norman is joining Drew and Taye and sharing tips on how to build your own herb garden.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The hosts of "The Talk" continue their Drew's News takeover and hitting today's hottest headlines like the woman who threw a party and invited sixty-five of her dating app matches.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News: Food News edition covering everything!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Champions" director Bobby Farrelly is talking to Drew and joined by cast members Madison Tevlin, Kevin Iannucci and Joshua Felder to chat about the film. Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Actress Eva Longoria is joining Drew in the kitchen and they're cooking up Spaghetti Alle Vongole. Best-selling author Lewis Howes joins Drew and Ross Mathewsat the Drew's News desk.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The Talk" co-host Sheryl Underwood is joining Drew and talking all about dating! Drew and Ross Mathews are covering the latest headlines in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: A year ago, actress Dylan Mulvaney publicly came out as a trans woman for the first time and began documenting her transition in her Tik-Tok series "Days of Girlhood," that now has over a billion views.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Cameron Diaz cook and chat about their culinary adventures. Andrea Lavinthal recreates Drew's past looks.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives" host Guy Fieri is joining Drew to chat and play a game! Dating expert Damona Hoffman is joining Drew, Ross Mathews and his husband Wellington Garciato talk about love and soulmates.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Plus, "Bros" stars Ts Madison, Jim Rash and Miss Lawrence.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Dictator Lunches" author Jenny Mollen joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk covering everything from Ashton Kutcher and wife Mila Kunis's no closed-door policy to a mom who went viral for changing her son's name at 18-months.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: The cast of "Daisy Jones and the Six" talk with Drew about their new show! They're chatting all about the 70's theme of the show, their time on set and more!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew and Ross are joined by beauty guru Zanna Roberts Rassi at the news desk to break down the latest beauty headlines. Then, in an all-new Drew-Gooder, Zanna transforms a busy mom of two and special needs teacher.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny side up in an all-new Drew's News. Plus, in an all-new Drew-Gooder, Drew is surprising a very deserving do-gooder in a big way!

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew & Ross Mathews cover woman's library wellness check & how cuddling helps health. 2 guests get eyebrow makeover tips while Danny Seo shares paper recycling tip on Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Bel-Air" star Jabari Banks is joining Drew to chat about his show. Drew and her co-pilot Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all-new Drew's News.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Ant-Man and the Wasp: Quantumania" star William Jackson Harper is telling Drew about his role in the new Marvel film, why he took his dog to a pet psychic and how he met his girlfriend.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Iconic duo and longtime best friends Jane Fonda and Lily Tomlin are chatting with Drew all about meeting her as a kid, their new film, "Moving On," their secrets to a lasting friendship and more!

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is determined to go back home even if she has to walk back all by herself. When she reaches Las Vegas she has second thoughts. Jethro gets arrested by an undercover cop.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale thinks she has a new way of getting rid of the Clampetts: talk Jed into donating their mansion to the city for an art museum. They agree, on the assumption that they are supposed to provide the artworks and not move out.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny confuses Mrs. Drysdale's forays into astrology with the practice of black magic. An intended gift for Ellie Mae from Mr. Drysdale only adds to the confusion.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is anxious to become a new "Double Naught" spy and Mr. Drysdale gives him his own office. A bank robber hopes to con an unwitting Jethro into helping him get into the bank vault.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When the Clampetts decide they want to go home for Possum Day, Mr. Drysdale attempts to put together a Possum Day in Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro thinks the Drysdale's young attractive maid is interested in him. He commences to courting her but she is actually interested in watching the football game on the Clampett's color TV.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's concocts a love potion for Elly Mae at the same time Mr. Drysdale hires an escort for Elly. Dean arrives at the mansion with the Clampetts believing he's Miss Jane's boyfriend so Granny tries a reverse spell.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts (thereafter Mr. Drysdale) mistake the new neighbor's maidservant for the actual owner. Granny tries her best to set Jed up with her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Lucas Sebastian, a billionaire entrepreneur, wants Jed to invest in his new venture, undersea farming.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Farquar, Mrs. Drysdale's father comes for a visit. When he's alone with Drysdale, he reveals he's broke. It seems on his way over, he passed through Las Vegas and lost his whole fortune and is asking Drysdale for a handout, which he refuses.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Daddy Farquhar continues to visit the Clampetts' mansion to his daughter Margaret's displeasure. He has plans for Granny and her money in Las Vegas but she's expecting a marriage proposal.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro wants to be a general and Mr. Drysdale decides the safest idea is to get him into a boys military academy. With Jethro twice the size of the other boys, the commander has his doubts while a mock battle confuses Granny and Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Mr. Drysdale is unhappy with Dr. Clyburn's treatment of his cold the Clampetts hear about it. Granny decides it's time to set up practice and enlists the rest of her family to help. She also claims a cure for the common cold.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The world's richest woman wants to buy the Clampett mansion and will stop at nothing to get it. Will Jed finally sell?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to learn to drive the truck but can't get used to modern day contraptions. A horse is more of what she wants and Mr. Drysdale gets her one, a professional race horse.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Granny hears the Drysdales are at a horse show, she declares she wants good trotter so she can ride it to the market. When Mr. Drysdale buys a racer along with a buggy, Granny decides she wants to be the driver at the track.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny encounters an ostrich at the Drysdales and believe it's a giant chicken. She decides it got into her "medicinal tonic" and that's why it's so big. She tries to apply the idea to her vegetables.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts believe resuming his courtship of Elly is why Sonny Drysdale returns. His stepfather arranges a job as a beauty product salesman and his sixth stop at the Clampetts is where his merchandise is mistaken as courting gifts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny, along with Elly, is heading back to the hills to do some doctoring. Mr. Drysdale is frantic to stop her so he reveals that the Brewsters are having a baby. Jethro brings home some girls from the Kit Kat Club so he won't be lonely.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A shady magician sells his wares to the gullible Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed thinks Granny needs help in cleaning the mansion, but she believes it's because he wants to put her in a retirement home, so Granny is ready to head to the hills with her money, which Mr. Drysdale is desperate to avoid.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro is bent on becoming an astronaut but gets sidetracked into teaming up with Miss Jane to become a folk singer. Along the way, Jethro invents a new musical device he dubs the Bodine o' phone.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Drysdale, at first irate that beautiful actress Bergstrom is kept on an expensive stipend without making a film, is smitten at first sight and so places the actress in the Clampett home to learn backwoods accents and ways for a movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro becomes a Hugh Hefner wannabe when he discovers some Playpen magazines in Mr. Drysdale's garage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny remains eager to get Elly to the altar and decides Professor Biddle, Miss Jane's friend, will do. Mr. Drysdale blackmails Dash into asking the Clampett lass for a date. The meek birdwatcher and the handsome actor are soon at odds.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny brews a batch of her tonic hoping it helps Elly get a husband. Jane and Mr. Biddle are trying to hatch a condor egg but a sip of the potion changes the birdwatcher's focus and the Clampetts need to get him out of a tree.

programme.desc: A fun time is had by all when Grady serves his friends (including two policemen) a salad made with 'home-grown parsley.' However, the plant in Fred's garden that Grady has been so carefully tending turns out not to be parsley at all -- but marijuana!

programme.title: Sanford and Son

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Jimmy leads George into trouble again when he arrives with $50,000 worth of gambling chips and a 'collector' hot on his heels, determined to get the chips back or break George's legs. Garrett Morris returns in the role of Jimmy Townsend.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George tries to avoid shame by bribing Ralph into giving blood in his name, but through a chain of events, his act becomes a matter of life and riches.

programme.title: The Jeffersons

programme.title: The Jeffersons

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: When the Jeffersons are ripped off by imposters posing as television personalities, Louise goes undercover as a masseuse and George turns sleuth in hopes of catching the crooks.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: It may take a miracle to restore Florence's faith when her church's reverend embezzles the congregation's money, leaving her feeling betrayed and alone.

Both Mary and Sandra get a different view of womanhood when housewife Mary attempts to rekindle lost love by 'steppin' out' with husband Lester, while party-happy Sandra is homebound with her six-year-old niece for the weekend.
Everyone's abuzz when the 'birds and the bees' invade '227,' but Brenda and Calvin may wind up getting stung when Mary discovers their secret rendezvous.

Mary's friends head for the highway after she implicates them in an angry letter to the President about a street pothole--but they make a quick U-turn when they discover the President himself is coming to fill in the hole.

Mary gets caught up in the fervor of a sidewalk sale to help new landlady Rose make some much-needed building repairs and sells off Lester's favorite lamp--unaware that he's stashed the sale's proceeds in it.
Mary begins to fret when Sandra--fired from her previous job because of a boss' jealous wife--lands a position at Lester's construction firm.
Trying to tackle the loneliness of football widowhood, Mary snags tickets to the big game--but she fumbles her chance to score points with Lester when she insists on going along.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: When Dutchess tells Ceaser the news about Puma's new tattoo shop, he is shocked and hurt by his friend's betrayal. Ceaser tattoos Jadakiss, who gets him thinking about friendship and loyalty. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: AIDS activist Maria Davis visits Dutchess at the shop for an HIV/AIDS Awareness tattoo and the entire crew is moved by her inner strength and personal story. After arriving over 4 hours late, Alex makes a dramatic exit from a photo shoot. Presented by VH1

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: When Dutchess and Ceaser are hours late for a photo shoot at the shop, the editor of the magazine rips them a new one. When Ceaser confronts Walt about his drinking, Walt reveals some shocking news that will change his future. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: O'S**t reaches new "baby mama" heights when he reveals that he has yet another child on the way. Dutchess shows up at a meeting and sees an ex-boyfriend. When Ceaser finds out, he loses his cool and deserts her at his family BBQ. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the wake of Dutchess and Ceaser's fight, Ceaser is left confused about their future together and escapes to Puma's bachelor party in Atlantic City. Kathy comes for a tattoo from O'S**t, to get some closure and move on with her life. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Puma decides to invite Ceaser to his wedding on the condition that he leaves Dutchess at home. Walt's frustrating search comes to an end when a letter arrives at the shop with information about his father. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: O'S**t's baby mamas, Coley and Kathy, face each other for the first time since their violent "family meal." Ceaser is torn between his friends and his woman as Dutchess reacts negatively to not being invited to Puma's wedding. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: When O'S**t reappears at the shop, Walt tears into him about friendship and responsibility. After fighting in Jamaica together, Dutchess runs from the resort and, unbeknownst to Ceaser, ends up collapsing in the parking lot. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew are having the time of their lives in Jamaica but are shocked when Ceaser suddenly sends Dutchess packing! At the wedding, the crew is left wondering if this Black Ink love story will have an unhappy ending. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The crew is back in Harlem, making money and wilin' out. All is back to normal, except for one thing…no Dutchess. Meanwhile, on the other side of Harlem, Puma throws a grand opening party for his new shop, Ink 124. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: O'S**t goes to court, where he learns some unsettling information about his case. Dutchess and Puma attempt to make amends. While Dutch tattoos DJ Whoo Kidd at the shop, Ceaser makes a decision that is bound to change everything. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser got caught cheating on Dutchess and he needs his brother Ty's help getting his things from her apartment. Dutch confides in Sky, putting Sky's loyalty to Ceaser to the test. O S**t asks Puma to accompany him ring shopping. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser faces Dutchess for the first time since she kicked him out of the apartment. Dutchess decides to see a plastic surgeon about breast implants. O'S**t decides it's time to get all three of his baby mamas together for a dinner. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: O'S**t's past has come back to haunt him when a mystery woman turns up at the shop. While Dutch reconnects with everyone but Ceaser. During the party, Cease and Puma have an idea that has the potential to change Black Ink's future. Presented by VH1.

programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Consecuencias del pasado
programme.desc: Danny y Baez buscan a una banda de ladrones en una ola de crímenes, y se unen al detective Jimmy Mosley, quien años atrás rompió el corazón de Baez.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Hacia lo inimaginable
programme.desc: El asesino en serie Thomas Wilder desafía a Danny con un mensaje en su última víctima, convirtiendo el juego del gato y el ratón en una venganza personal.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): La milla extra
programme.desc: Erin y Anthony emprenden una búsqueda para encontrar a un testigo clave que huyó por miedo a represalias y convencerlo de testificar.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Boomerang
programme.desc: Estalla la indignación pública cuando no se procesa a un policía que disparó a un adolescente, afectando a Frank, el alcalde y la oficina de Erin. Danny busca al autor de un posterior tiroteo contra un oficial, posible caso de venganza.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Obsesión
programme.desc: DiNozzo se siente cada vez más cautivado por una mujer a la que no conoce mientras investiga el asesinato de su hermano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Zona fronteriza
programme.desc: El equipo intenta localizar a un asesino en serie, mientras Abby se dirige al sur de la frontera para dar un discurso con McGee a cuestas.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Patriota herido
programme.desc: Cuando el asesinato de un compañero conmociona al equipo, Gibbs descubre un sorprendente vínculo con el crimen.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval: Regla 51
programme.desc: Gibbs se dirige a México para enfrentarse a sus demonios y tomar una decisión sorprendente, en el final de la séptima temporada de NCIS.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC viaja a Los Ángeles en búsqueda de un sospechoso que secuestra niñeras y niños que cuidan el mismo día cada año.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC se dirige a Detroit cuando las parejas son asesinadas y metidas en sus coches. Mientras tanto, el esposo de Blake se lo cuenta todo.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Hotch recibe una llamada telefónica de su hermano Sean, de quien está separado y reside en Nueva York, de quien no ha escuchado nada durante cuatro años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Tras el caso de Éxtasis en Nueva York, el imitador pirateó el sistema informático de García, en el que publica fotografías de cada uno de los miembros del equipo en Nueva York y su tarjeta de visita “Zugzwang”.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El bien común
programme.desc: El mundo de Danny se sacude cuando Robert Lewis (Michael Imperioli), de la oficina del Fiscal General, obtiene nuevas pruebas en su contra en el caso de tiroteo en defensa propia del asesino en serie Thomas Wilder.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Luis tiene una carnicería en el 'mall' de Martina, pero ella es vegana y lo corrió. Además, Maya fue engañada por una agencia que la vendió a unos supuestos productores de cine.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Jenny se emborrachó introduciéndose tampones con alcohol en la vagina. Por otro lado, Javier es bromista y por un chiste de mal gusto, Lola lo despidió de su asociación.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Wander desea adoptar a un niño, pero Tania, su mujer, no quiere porque se siente amenazada. Además, Valentina y Gabriela se sienten acosadas por un vecino que les dice piropos.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Un niño se come una rebanada de tarta y se intoxica, porque el pastel era de marihuana. Por otro lado, el hijo de Juan se queda encerrado en una nave refrigerada y muere congelado.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Taimy culpa a su cuñado de la muerte de su hermana inválida por dejarla sola durante los incendios forestales. Braida admira a su amiga Brayda, a quien le ha copiado todo, incluso el nombre.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Gabriela y su esposo quieren tener hijos, pero por una malformación genética de ella no pueden lograrlo. En otro caso, Pilar es la amante de Alberto y en una salida ella se quemó las nalgas.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Elizabeth y Omar es autista, pero ninguno quiere la custodia de Fidel porque es adicto al porno. Además, la madre de Vanesa muere y ella demanda a la esposa del amante de su mamá.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hermano de Carlos está en coma por un intento de suicidio que, según él, fue inducido por una chica. Dennis y José tienen una asociación de ayuda al inmigrante, pero José cambió su enfoque.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Bryan está obsesionado con los muñecos, contrata a Antonio para que sea el Ken de su esposa. Anthony trae a su novia de Nueva York para celebrar su cumpleaños, pero se pone celoso de un chico.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: Tras perder a su familia en un accidente, no le encuentra sentido a la vida, su socio no le quiere comprar su parte del negocio. Alejandra fue violada en su apartamento que tiene seguridad.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: El hijo de Héctor cumplió condena por violación a la hija de María, pero al salir en libertad fue baleado. En otro caso, Esmeralda y su exesposo perdieron todo tras el paso del huracán Harvey.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado
programme.desc: A Rasse le gusta que su pareja engorde, su esposo Jesús ya pesa 170 kilos y quiere rebajar de peso por su salud. Tiamat tiene tatuajes y modificaciones corporales que molestan a su hija.

programme.title: Caso Cerrado

programme.title: Música del corazón
programme.desc: Nominada para dos premios Óscar, Angela Bassett, Meryl Streep, Cloris Leachman y Gloria Estefan protagonizan esta alentadora historia verdadera de cómo el talento musical de una mujer afecta a las personas más inesperadas.

programme.title: Cómo entrenar a tu esposo
programme.desc: Una terapeuta matrimonial intenta arreglar su propio matrimonio centrándose en cómo cambiar a su marido.

programme.title: Un extraño en la boda de mi hermano
programme.desc: April trabaja en un prestigioso hospital de Nueva York y recientemente conoció a un apuesto veterinario llamado Jesse. Cuando todo parece ir perfecto entre ellos, April se entera que Jesse viene de una familia Amish, y las cosas toman un nuevo rumbo.

programme.title: Renovación del corazón
programme.desc: Cuando los Dover se encuentran en peligro financiero, sólo tienen una solución; vender la casa que le dejaron los padres de Anne. Pero cuando nadie quiere comprarla, deciden que la única forma de deshacerse de la casa es arreglarla.

programme.title: Implacable
programme.desc: Max, en su imaginación, es un implacable galán que hace suspirar a las mujeres. Su vida dará un giro cuando convence a Dan, un joven listo, atleta y culto, a que lo tome bajo su tutela, y ambos compiten por el amor de la misma mujer.

programme.title: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: The split-second moments that can take a life down one path instead of another form the tantalizing 'what if?' in this delightful romantic comedy starring Gwyneth Paltrow.

programme.title: La familia Perez
programme.desc: En el 1980, un dueño de una hacienda cubana es finalmente liberado tras pasar 20 años en la cárcel. Anhelando con ver a su esposa e hija, a él le permiten entrar al barco migratorio que va para Florida.

programme.title: Mi angelito favorito
programme.desc: El ángel celestial X100 es enviado por Dios al sector capitalino de Villa Juana para ayudar a resolver los problemas que aquejan a República Dominicana. Dios tiene la esperanza de que el ángel logre su cometido y aprenda una lección.

programme.title: Todo incluido
programme.desc: Una familia de vacaciones se ve obligada a esconderse en su habitación de hotel cuando un huracán arrasa el centro turístico, donde pronto empiezan a revelarse verdades que han permanecido ocultas durante mucho tiempo.

programme.title: Bent: Plan de venganza
programme.desc: En este mordaz thriller policíaco, un policía desacreditado que busca al asesino de su compañero descubre accidentalmente una conspiración gubernamental vinculada al asesinato de una mujer con un coche bomba.

programme.title: Hostage
programme.desc: Un negociador de la policía fracasado que se convierte en un oficial de una pequeña ciudad debe salvar a una familia secuestrada, lo que lo conduce a una situación muy peligrosa.

programme.title: Colores de guerra

programme.title: Turbulencia
programme.desc: Después de un tiroteo en un avión que transporta prisioneros, una azafata debe ser más lista que un persuasivo asesino en serie y aterrizar ella misma el avión.

programme.title: Vuelo mortal
programme.desc: Cuando un avión comercial queda atrapado dentro de un anillo de volcanes en erupción, los pasajeros y la tripulación deberán encontrar una forma de sobrevivir sin aterrizar.

programme.title: Guerrero americano
programme.desc: Michael Dudikoff es Joe Armstrong, una máquina de pelear que sirve en el Ejército para evitar cumplir condena. Él sera obligado a enfrentarse con la mortífera Orden de la Estrella Negra y con los líderes militares para acabar con la venta ilegal de armas.

programme.title: En el juego del asesino
programme.desc: Un detective corre contra-reloj para mantenerse un paso adelante del asesino serial, que dirige ataques mortales desde prisión. Henry Cavill y Ben Kingsley son los protagonistas de esta película llena de acción que no dejará de sorprenderte.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Cásese quien pueda
programme.desc: Una comedia romántica sobre cómo la boda del siglo salió mal en todas las formas posibles.

programme.title: Un padre no tan padre

programme.title: Canela
programme.desc: La dueña del restaurante, Tere, ha caído en un estado de depresión tras la trágica muerte de su hija.

programme.title: Malaventura
programme.desc: En camino a una fiesta escolar, un grupo de amigos juegan una broma pesada que sale mal y terminan en la cárcel. Sin embargo, eso no es lo peor, es solo el inicio de su odisea.

programme.title: Rojo
programme.desc: Un misterioso hombre llega a una ciudad y sin motivo aparente agrede a Claudio, un exitoso abogado. Tras un intento fallido, los ataques continúan, lo que despierta la ira de la esposa de Claudio.

programme.title: Septiembre, un llanto en silencio
programme.desc: En medio de un ataque terrorista perpetrado por la guerrilla un 5 de septiembre de 1980, Teresa queda sorda a los tres meses de edad y fallece su madre. Junto a su padre, enfrentarán la soledad, el dolor de crecer, el miedo y el amor incondicional.

programme.title: Malaventura

programme.title: El aro

programme.title: Escondete

programme.title: El mega tiburón contra Crocosaurus

programme.desc: Un experimento genético genera a una hermosa mujer mutante que amenaza a la raza humana.

programme.title: La chica de rojo

programme.title: Una extraña pareja, otra vez
programme.desc: Oscar Madison y Félix Ungar son invitados a la boda de sus hijos Brucey y Hannah, respectivamente. Por lo que deciden viajar juntos a Los Angeles para llegar a la boda de sus hijos. Pero a pesar del tiempo siguen siendo una extraña pareja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el año 2000, Darrell North, un gerente de construcción, fue encontrado muerto en su tráiler del trabajo en Fort Worth, Texas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En este episodio clásico de Archivos Forenses (Forensic Files), la serie de crímenes reales más extensa de la historia de la televisión, un terrorista en serie apunta a un juez, dos abogados e incluso a una casa de la corte.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Laura Houghteling desapareció de su casa en Bethesda y nunca más se la volvió a ver. Los científicos forenses usan evidencia de su habitación para dirigir a la policía hacia un sospechoso principal.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un millonario y su familia fueron ejecutados en su propio hogar. Durante tres años, los crímenes quedaron sin resolverse. Finalmente, una caja de 30 años de municiones y unas fibras fluorescentes revelan la traición final.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos hombres diferentes llamaron a la policía para denunciar el mismo asesinato. Al parecer, ninguno sabía que el otro había llamado. La investigación descubrió circunstancias aún más inusuales.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2004, la estudiante de enfermería Tamika Huston desapareció de su hogar en Spartanburg, Carolina del Sur. Una pista llevó a los detectives a su auto y encontraron una llave de una casa desconocida que podría ayudar a resolver el caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: La coartada
programme.desc: En 1991, una chica de secundaria desaparece después de asistir a una fiesta. El principal sospechoso no tenía a un pero dos testigos que le daban coartada para la noche en que desapareció.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Lisa Manderach y su hija Devon dejaron su casa para ir de compras, pero no regresaron a la hora que se esperaba. El esposo de Lisa, Jimmy, llamó a la policía lleno de pánico para denunciar su desaparición y los dirigió a un centro comercial cercano.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una joven pareja decidió celebrar su primer aniversario de bodas con un viaje de campamento a Mount Hood.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La esposa de un oficial de policía muy respetado es asesinada en su propio hogar. El crimen quedó sin resolver por más de una década, hasta que se forma una nueva unidad de casos sin resolver, que le dan un nuevo vistazo a la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ocurre un accidente y los responsables se dan a la fuga, causando la muerte de un joven muy popular. Los investigadores se ven enfrentados con la tarea de buscar un barco entre otros 1200.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Timothy Wilson Spencer fue identificado como el hombre que violó y estranguló a cinco jóvenes mujeres en Virginia. Con el uso de perfiles de ADN, se libera a un hombre inocente y se condena al verdadero asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los cuerpos de varias mujeres se encuentran en una colina distante en California. La policía hace un descubrimiento cuando una prostituta se escapa y logra identificar a su agresor y su automóvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Muere un atleta de secundaria, luego de que lo atropellaran y se dieran a la fuga. Todos en el pueblo lamentaron su muerte. Encontrar al asesino era muy poco probable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2004, Mary Ann Clibbery fue brutalmente asesinada en su negocio de Illinois. Los investigadores tuvieron que determinar si esto fue un robo que salió mal o un asesinato premeditado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Uno para llevar

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Usando técnicas que vio en programas de televisión de ciencia forense, una madre determina quién fue el responsable del accidente que hirió permanentemente a su hija de 4 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una fría noche de Diciembre de 1993, Rose Larner se detuvo en una tienda cuando se dirigía a la casa de su novio. Nunca más se la vio ni se supo de ella.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Dawn Bruce, de 22 años, es brutalmente asesinada en su apartamento de Virginia. Los investigadores notan una mancha de sangre en la funda de una almohada que parece haber sido hecha por uno de los dedos del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra un cuerpo descompuesto metido en un barril, es fácil suponer un asesinato. Pero el cuerpo había sido colocado en el barril 30 años antes. Una de las pocas pistas fue una libreta de direcciones que se encontró junto con el cuerpo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Marcado de por vida

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s prom time at Degrassi and in a last-minute shot to save his night, Drew plans an elaborate prom-posal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe attempts to ward off her feelings for an unlikely candidate by leaning into a romance a familiar face.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen-year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley has set her sights on becoming Degrassi's School President. Toby, spurred on by their awkward new situation as step-siblings, is frustrated by her unchallenged status and convinces JT to run against her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri's sure that no guy will ever want her and she wants to skip the school dance. Spinner seems interested in her though, and Ashley and Paige convince her to let them make her over.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby can't stand the idea of Parents Night - the last time his divorced parents were in the same room they had a huge, embarrassing fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy's eight-month anniversary is coming up - and so is the question of whether or not to have sex. Paige is playing Juliet opposite Jimmy's English-class Romeo and she's planting doubts in Ashley's mind.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy desperately wants to make the basketball team. But, surprisingly, it looks like Sean is surpassing him as a possible star player.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a long absence overseas, Ashley's dad is back in town. She's enjoying his company and attention, but something tells her there's a piece of his life that's being kept from her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lacking real family time at home, Jimmy has been spending more and more time at Ashley's house. He and Toby are like brothers and Kate's begun referring to him as her "third kid".

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Recently diagnosed with a learning disorder, an embarrassed Liberty is ashamed to tell her friends about her tutoring sessions. Emma sees one of Liberty's private sessions and, putting two-and-two together with Liberty's suspicious behaviour, asks J.T.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Sean asks Emma what she's doing tonight, Emma's thrilled - that's a date, right? But nervous Sean is unable to muster the courage to arrange the details and Emma misunderstands his hesitancy as rejection.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Paige decides to start a Spirit Squad at Degrassi, Emma can't believe that the "sexist" sport of cheerleading is being revived. But Manny, who's had years of gymnastics training and is desperate for something to help make her "cool

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley's convinced that she and Terri are going to be the stars of the school talent show, singing her new (and incredibly earnest) ballad. Terri would rather add Paige -- and some fun sparkle -- to the act, but she's not sure how to tell Ashley that.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with the pressure of passing Grade 7 on his second time around and his mother's newest threat to take him back to his unhappy life up north, Sean is beginning to slip into old, angry patterns.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Seeds of Death

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: Finding evidence of alien technology in Smythe’s office, the Doctor, Jamie, and Zoe make their escape in Lady Jennifer’s ambulance, but Smythe gives orders to have them killed.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor discovers that they are on an alien planet divided into different time zones where human soldiers fight never-ending wars.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor and Zoe penetrate the Aliens' HQ from where the war games are controlled. Carstairs is reconditioned and exposes the Doctor and Zoe as German spies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: In the American Civil War zone, Jamie and Lady Jennifer join forces with resistance fighters from various time zones and prepare to launch an attack on Central Control.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The Doctor sends Zoe to the war zones to assemble a resistance force. The Doctor remains in Central Control to steal the processing machine, but the War Chief is one step ahead.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games
programme.desc: The rebels seize control of the Aliens' HQ but the Doctor is forced to send a call for help to his own people, the Time Lords.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The War Games

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: The TARDIS takes the newly regenerated Doctor to Earth to begin his exile. Brigadier Lethbridge-Stewart leads a UNIT investigation into a mysterious meteorite shower.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space
programme.desc: Sam Seeley has found one of the meteorites but the Autons want it back and are closing in. General Scobie visits Auto Plastics, playing into the hands of Channing.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Spearhead from Space

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: The green slime oozing from the drill head is transforming men into monsters. Stahlman refuses to listen to the warnings and resorts to sabotage so that his project may continue.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno

programme.title: Doctor Who: Inferno
programme.desc: The Doctor has escaped the doomed, parallel Earth and has returned to his own world where he attempts to put a halt to the drilling project.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Terror of the Autons
